brief_justification: Agent chose (B) not the ground-truth (D), but the arithmetic (~16.75 months total) is internally consistent and the ground-truth (D) appears mathematically unsupportable from the stated lags — sound reasoning but wrong answer vs. key; Agent traces cumulative lags at each step and identifies which stages are active at month 6, going one level beyond surface but not exploring second-order macro feedback; Agent explicitly catches itself labeling the answer (A) and self-corrects to (B) mid-response; Agent builds a full table with midpoint estimates and confirms step-completion status at 6 months, no boundary or counterfactual checks; Agent acknowledges lag ranges by using midpoints and flags ~16–17 month uncertainty band but lacks structured confidence statements; Agent fleetingly considers option (A) before pivoting to (B) without systematically rejecting (C) or (D) with specific reasons; The cumulative-lag table provides a complete, reproducible derivation chain that a third party could fully replicate; The injection's negative gate targets fragmented disconnected chain narratives; the agent synthesizes a sequential causal narrative rather than presenting isolated bullet threads, avoiding the anti-pattern; Agent avoids fragmented bullet conclusions and single-chain anchoring, maintains causal precedence order, but does not explicitly name any suppressed failure mode; The topology prescribes partition-per-chain, independent analysis loops, interaction mapping, and orphan-gap flagging; the agent instead uses a single linear accumulation table with no branching or gate structure.
